keyFeatures.en: Free online photo and vector editor
keyFeatures.zh: 免费在线图片和矢量编辑器

description.zh: 基本编辑工具，功能有限

weaknesses.en: Limited features and tools compared to paid plans
weaknesses.zh: 与付费计划相比功能和工具有限

targetAudience.en: Individuals and small teams looking for a free photo editor
targetAudience.zh: 寻找免费图片编辑器的个人和小团队

positioning.en: A free alternative to paid photo editing software
positioning.zh: 付费图片编辑软件的免费替代品
